user.title: HausMan Hub HASC settings
user.description: Initial setup grants no device control. Climate rollout is configured separately and remains disabled by default.

data_description.mode: Choose read-only observation or a comparison without changes.

error.unsafe_mode: Only read-only and comparison-without-changes modes are allowed.

init.title: HausMan Hub HASC settings
init.description: Both control paths are off by default. The legacy helper canary controls one input boolean. The climate bridge reads the existing Climate API in shadow and can post typed commands only for one explicitly selected canary room.

data_description.mode: Choose read-only observation or a comparison without changes.
data_description.local_summary_enabled: Shows or closes only the optional local page with the same nine aggregate counts. It does not control the home.
data_description.summary_update_interval: Choose 5, 15, or 30 minutes for the same nine local counts. HASC never reads them more often than the existing five-minute interval.
data_description.canary_control_enabled: Creates one HASC switch only for the selected input boolean. Turn this off for immediate rollback.
data_description.canary_control_target: Select exactly one input_boolean helper. Lights, climate, locks, covers, scripts, scenes, and other domains are rejected.
data_description.climate_bridge_mode: Disabled is full rollback. Shadow reads and validates without posting. Canary may post only typed commands for one eligible room.
data_description.climate_bridge_target: Use only an HTTP(S) origin with a literal loopback or RFC1918/ULA address, for example http://192.168.1.10:1880. Paths, credentials, DNS names, query strings, and public addresses are rejected.
data_description.climate_canary_room_id: Required only in canary mode. Use the stable room ID advertised by the Climate API.

error.unsafe_mode: Only read-only and comparison-without-changes modes are allowed.
error.unsafe_local_summary_setting: The optional local page can only be turned on or off.
error.unsafe_summary_update_interval: Choose only 5, 15, or 30 minutes for the nine-count refresh.
error.unsafe_canary_control_setting: The control canary can only be armed or disarmed.
error.unsafe_canary_control_target: An armed control canary requires exactly one input_boolean helper.
error.unsafe_climate_bridge_mode: Choose disabled, shadow, or canary for the climate bridge.
error.unsafe_climate_bridge_target: Use one private literal HTTP(S) origin without a path or credentials.
error.unsafe_climate_canary_room: Canary mode requires one stable lowercase room ID.
